languages.text: {n}Ведка замирает в почтительном поклоне, сложив аквилу на груди. Ее бойцы, однако, не сводят глаз с вашего предка, а их лазганы переведены в режим боеготовности.{/n}
{n}Vedka freezes in a reverent bow, forming the Aquila over her chest. Her soldiers, however, keep their eyes fixed upon your ancestor, their lasguns set to combat readiness.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ведка замирает в почтительном поклоне, сложив аквилу на груди. Ее бойцы, однако, не сводят глаз с вашего предка, а их лазганы переведены в режим боеготовности.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka freezes in a reverent bow, forming the aquila over her chest. Her soldiers, however, keep their eyes fixed upon your ancestor, their lasguns set to combat readiness.{/n}

{n}Vedka freezes in a reverent bow, forming the Aquila over her chest. Her soldiers, however, keep their eyes fixed upon your ancestor, their lasguns set to combat readiness.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vedka verneigt sich ehrfürchtig und macht vor ihre Brust das Zeichen des Adlers. Ihre kampfbereiten Soldaten lassen deinen Ahnherrn mit entsicherten Lasergewehren allerdings keine Sekunde aus den Augen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka freezes in a reverent bow, forming the Aquila over her chest. Her soldiers, however, keep their eyes fixed upon your ancestor, their lasguns set to combat readiness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka verneigt sich ehrfürchtig und macht vor ihre Brust das Zeichen des Adlers. Ihre kampfbereiten Soldaten lassen deinen Ahnherrn mit entsicherten Lasergewehren allerdings keine Sekunde aus den Augen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vedka s'immobilise dans une révérence, traçant le signe de l'Aquila sur sa poitrine. De leur côté, ses soldats gardent les yeux rivés sur votre ancêtre, prêts à brandir leur fusil laser.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka freezes in a reverent bow, forming the Aquila over her chest. Her soldiers, however, keep their eyes fixed upon your ancestor, their lasguns set to combat readiness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka s'immobilise dans une révérence, traçant le signe de l'Aquila sur sa poitrine. De leur côté, ses soldats gardent les yeux rivés sur votre ancêtre, prêts à brandir leur fusil laser.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vedka se detiene en una reverencia servil mientras forma el Aquila frente a su pecho. Sus soldados, en cambio, mantienen la mirada fija en tu ancestro, con los rifles láser preparados para el combate.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka freezes in a reverent bow, forming the Aquila over her chest. Her soldiers, however, keep their eyes fixed upon your ancestor, their lasguns set to combat readiness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka se detiene en una reverencia servil mientras forma el Aquila frente a su pecho. Sus soldados, en cambio, mantienen la mirada fija en tu ancestro, con los rifles láser preparados para el combate.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vedka, göğsünde Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yaparak saygıyla eğilirken donakalıyor. Ancak askerleri, silazerleri savaşa hazır hâlde gözlerini atandan ayırmıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka freezes in a reverent bow, forming the Aquila over her chest. Her soldiers, however, keep their eyes fixed upon your ancestor, their lasguns set to combat readiness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka, göğsünde Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yaparak saygıyla eğilirken donakalıyor. Ancak askerleri, silazerleri savaşa hazır hâlde gözlerini atandan ayırmıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}薇德卡恭敬地鞠着躬，久久不肯起身，双手在胸前划出双头鹰手势。可她手下的士兵们，仍死死盯着你的先祖，激光枪随时准备开火。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka freezes in a reverent bow, forming the Aquila over her chest. Her soldiers, however, keep their eyes fixed upon your ancestor, their lasguns set to combat readiness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}薇德卡恭敬地鞠着躬，久久不肯起身，双手在胸前划出双头鹰手势。可她手下的士兵们，仍死死盯着你的先祖，激光枪随时准备开火。{/n}

languages.text: {n}ヴェドカは敬意を表して深く頭を下げ、胸にアキラの紋章を形成する。しかし彼女の兵士たちは、祖先をじっと見つめ、戦闘態勢を整えたラスガンを構えている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka freezes in a reverent bow, forming the Aquila over her chest. Her soldiers, however, keep their eyes fixed upon your ancestor, their lasguns set to combat readiness.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ヴェドカは敬意を表して深く頭を下げ、胸にアキラの紋章を形成する。しかし彼女の兵士たちは、祖先をじっと見つめ、戦闘態勢を整えたラスガンを構えている。{/n}
